isOpen.description: Controls whether the popover is visible.

onClose.description: Callback invoked when the popover should close (click outside, Escape key).

triggerElement.description: The DOM element the popover is anchored to for positioning.

items.description: Array of list items to display inside the popover.

groups.description: Optional grouping of items with labeled section headers.

onSelect.description: Callback invoked when an item is selected.

selectedIndex.description: Index of the currently selected item (shows a check mark).

renderItem.description: Custom render function for each list item.

maxHeight.description: Maximum height of the popover container before scrolling.

width.description: Width of the popover. Defaults to the trigger element's width.

filter.description: Filter string to narrow down displayed items by label.

loading.description: Shows a loading spinner instead of items.

emptyMessage.description: Message displayed when no items match the filter.

children.description: Content rendered above the item list (e.g., a search input).
